Description
org.springframework.ai.model.ollama.autoconfigure

org.springframework.ai.ollama.management
Management support for Ollama.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.ollama.api used by org.springframework.ai.model.ollama.autoconfigure
    Class
    Description
    OllamaApi
    Java Client for the Ollama API.
    OllamaChatOptions
    Helper class for creating strongly-typed Ollama options.
    OllamaEmbeddingOptions
    Helper class for creating strongly-typed Ollama options.

  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.ollama.api used by org.springframework.ai.ollama.api
    Class
    Description
    OllamaApi
    Java Client for the Ollama API.
    OllamaApi.Builder
     
    OllamaApi.ChatRequest
    Chat request object.
    OllamaApi.ChatRequest.Builder
     
    OllamaApi.ChatRequest.Tool
    Represents a tool the model may call.
    OllamaApi.ChatRequest.Tool.Function
    Function definition.
    OllamaApi.ChatRequest.Tool.Type
    Create a tool of type 'function' and the given function definition.
    OllamaApi.ChatResponse
    Ollama chat response object.
    OllamaApi.CopyModelRequest
     
    OllamaApi.DeleteModelRequest
     
    OllamaApi.EmbeddingsRequest
    Generate embeddings from a model.
    OllamaApi.EmbeddingsResponse
    The response object returned from the /embedding endpoint.
    OllamaApi.ListModelResponse
     
    OllamaApi.Message
    Chat message object.
    OllamaApi.Message.Builder
     
    OllamaApi.Message.Role
    The role of the message in the conversation.
    OllamaApi.Message.ToolCall
    The relevant tool call.
    OllamaApi.Message.ToolCallFunction
    The function definition.
    OllamaApi.Model
     
    OllamaApi.Model.Details
     
    OllamaApi.ProgressResponse
     
    OllamaApi.PullModelRequest
     
    OllamaApi.ShowModelRequest
     
    OllamaApi.ShowModelResponse
     
    OllamaChatOptions
    Helper class for creating strongly-typed Ollama options.
    OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder
     
    OllamaChatOptions.Builder
     
    OllamaEmbeddingOptions
    Helper class for creating strongly-typed Ollama options.
    OllamaEmbeddingOptions.Builder
     
    OllamaModel
    Helper class for common Ollama models.
    ThinkOption
    Represents the thinking option for Ollama models.
    ThinkOption.ThinkBoolean
    Boolean-style think option for models that support simple enable/disable.
    ThinkOption.ThinkLevel
    String-level think option for the GPT-OSS model which requires explicit levels.
